title: How immediate payment works
notes: Fixed Price listings automatically set to Good Till Canceled; renew monthly on same day

title: Accepted payment methods
notes: Google Pay automatically added as payment option for managed payments sellers

title: It's so eBay being Green (Monday)
notes: eBay coined term in 2007; second Monday of December - busiest last-minute holiday shopping day

title: eBay Guaranteed Fit
notes: Guarantees automotive parts fit buyer's vehicle or free return; excludes tires and wheels

title: My eBay for Guests
notes: Allows purchases without eBay account; access via email confirmation with guest order code

title: Authenticity Guarantee for Handbags Sellers
notes: Free authentication for handbags $500+; optional $40 service for $200-$499

title: Handling time
notes: Business days between payment and carrier scan; recommended 2 days or less

title: eBay Customer Service
notes: Main eBay help and customer service portal

title: Hermes Paketshop
notes: Delivery to Hermes PaketShop locations in Germany; policy changes effective January 2026

title: Hub vendeur
notes: French Seller Hub - centralized seller management tool; free for all sellers with at least one sale

title: Managing images
notes: Supports JPG, GIF, PNG, BMP, TIFF, AVIF, HEIC, WEBP; max 12MB, 15,000 pixel dimension limit

title: How immediate payment works
notes: Requires payment at checkout for fixed-price and auction Buy It Now; not available with Best Offer

title: Taxes and import charges
notes: Customs duties, taxes, and fees for international purchases; paid at checkout or on delivery

title: Traffic report details
notes: Appearance of item thumbnail on eBay search pages; tracked via Analytics API and Seller Hub

title: eBay: In-Store pickup
notes: US site feature for large retail sellers; equivalent Click and Collect on UK, AU, DE sites

title: eBay: In-Store pickup
notes: Buy online, pickup in store (BOPIS); available to eligible large retail merchants

title: Indefinite suspension
notes: Permanent account suspension; no recovery; funds held 60 days; MC999 code commonly used

title: Starting July 1, 2024, Ebay will be charging a $2 flat fee for express payouts
notes: Express payout to debit card within 30 minutes for $2 flat fee; started July 2024

title: Intellectual property policy
notes: Verified Rights Owner (VeRO) program for copyright, trademark, patent infringement reporting

title: Selling internationally
notes: Optional upgrade for listings to appear in top search results on international eBay sites

title: eBay international standard delivery
notes: Ships to 210+ countries; $100 protection included; DDU (Delivered Duties Unpaid)

title: eBay bulk listing tools
notes: Seller Hub Reports, Bulk Listing Tool, Inventory API for SKU-based inventory management

title: Issue Resolution Center Launch
notes: Launched March 2026; central place to view and manage compliance-related tasks

title: Item condition by category
notes: Preset condition options vary by category; New, Certified/Seller Refurbished, Used categories

title: Item location policy
notes: Sellers must provide accurate ship-from location; violations result in listing removal or suspension

title: Get help with an item that hasn't arrived
notes: Money Back Guarantee; report within 30 days of delivery date; refund within 3-5 business days

title: Item specifics
notes: Descriptive keywords (brand, size, color, etc.); improve search visibility and filtering

title: Item specifics
notes: Required, Required Soon, and Recommended item specifics; critical for search filtering

title: Authenticity Guarantee for Jewelry
notes: Free for $500+; $40 for $200-$499; authenticated by GIA; includes loose diamonds

title: Priority campaign strategy
notes: Promoted Listings Advanced manual targeting; exact and phrase match; 10-15 keywords recommended

title: eBay | Paying with Klarna
notes: Pay in 4 (interest-free) or Klarna Financing (6-24 months); $35-$30,000 purchase range

title: translate: eBay Translation API
notes: API for translating listing titles and descriptions; machine learning optimized for e-commerce

title: Seller standards policy
notes: Must be ≤3% with ≤5 late shipments for Top Rated; carrier scan must occur within handling time
